title: knautia hirsuta
intro: Knautia hirsuta, also known as red clover, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Knautia hirsuta include reducing symptoms of menopause, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Knautia hirsuta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusement, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
